Furniture Removals Birmingham

Whether you need a single sofa moved across Birmingham or an entire household of furniture transported to a new address, The Royals Removals offers a dedicated furniture removal service designed around careful handling and complete peace of mind.

  • ✓ Fully insured & vetted professional team
  • ✓ Free no-obligation quotes in minutes
  • ✓ Same-day response & flexible move dates
  • ✓ Careful handling & damage protection guarantee
Get Your Quote 📞 07345 624506 📱 WhatsApp Us

📞 Can't wait? Call us direct: 07345 624506

Moving furniture requires more than just muscle — it demands skill, the right equipment, and genuine care for your belongings. Our furniture removals team is experienced in handling everything from heavy oak wardrobes and king-size beds to delicate antique tables and glass display cabinets.

We wrap every piece of furniture in professional protective materials before it leaves your property. This includes furniture blankets, bubble wrap for fragile surfaces, and stretch wrap to prevent scratches during transit. Your furniture is secured inside our vans with straps and padding to eliminate movement during the journey.

What's Included

  • ✓ Single item or full furniture removals
  • ✓ Professional wrapping with protective blankets
  • ✓ Careful handling of heavy and bulky items
  • ✓ Dismantling and reassembly where required
  • ✓ Safe transport in fully equipped removal vans
  • ✓ Loading and unloading at both locations
  • ✓ Sofa, bed, wardrobe, table, and cabinet moves
  • ✓ Free quotation with no hidden charges

Why Choose The Royals Removals?

Furniture is often the most valuable and awkward part of any move. A single scratch on a dining table or a dent on a wardrobe door can be costly and frustrating. That is why we invest in professional wrapping materials and train our team to handle furniture with exceptional care.

Our removals crew understands how to navigate narrow hallways, tight staircases, and awkward doorways that are common in Birmingham properties. We plan the best approach before we start, ensuring your furniture moves smoothly from room to van and van to room without damage.

We handle all types of furniture including sofas, beds, wardrobes, dressers, dining tables, desks, bookshelves, and sideboards. If it needs dismantling to fit through a doorway, our team can take it apart and reassemble it at your destination.

Fully Insured & Professionally Protected

Every move we carry out is covered by comprehensive goods-in-transit insurance (up to £50,000) and public liability insurance (up to £5 million). You are in safe hands with our insured moving company in Birmingham.

🛡️
Public Liability

Up to £5 million cover

🚛
Goods in Transit

Up to £50,000 per move

✅
Every Move Covered

No exceptions, no exclusions

Who Is This Service For?

  • Homeowners moving large or bulky furniture
  • Anyone purchasing furniture that needs delivering
  • Tenants moving single items between properties
  • Businesses relocating office furniture
  • Anyone clearing furniture from a property

Areas We Cover

We provide this service across Birmingham and the wider West Midlands.

Birmingham Dudley Sandwell Walsall Wolverhampton + View All Areas

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you move a single piece of furniture? +
Yes. We are happy to move individual items such as a sofa, bed, wardrobe, or dining table. You do not need a full house move to use our service.
How do you protect furniture during the move? +
We use professional furniture blankets, bubble wrap, and stretch film to wrap and protect every item. Inside the van, furniture is secured with ratchet straps and padding to prevent any movement.
Can you move furniture up and down stairs? +
Absolutely. Our team is experienced in manoeuvring furniture through tight staircases, narrow corridors, and small doorways. We assess the access before we begin and plan the safest approach.
Do you reassemble furniture at the new location? +
Yes. If we dismantle any furniture to facilitate the move, we will reassemble it at your new property and make sure everything is set up correctly.

Ready for a Royal Move?

Get your free, no-obligation quote in under 2 minutes. Fill out the quick form or call us directly. Our team responds in 10 to 15 minutes.
